title: Clownfish in Sea Anemone Coloring Page
seoTitle: Clownfish in Sea Anemone Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Download and print this detailed clownfish resting inside wavy tentacles of an anemone. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: clownfishs share a symbiotic relationship with sea anemones, living safely inside their stinging tentacles due to a protective mucus coat.
All clownfishs are born male; when the dominant female of a group dies, the largest male changes sex to become the new female.
